intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“dinner party -> hostess -> 坐在 Mrs. Rumbold 旁边 -> eyes fixed on her plate -> make conversation -> 三个 Will you be doing...? 问题 -> in despair -> eat more and talk less”的餐桌寒暄链读顺。注意礼貌问题要轻轻上扬，Mrs. Rumbold 的短回答要短而平，最后一句要 dry and pointed。

sentences.text: Last week at a dinner party, the hostess asked me to sit next to Mrs. Rumbold.
sentences.focus_zh: dinner party 是正式聚餐；hostess 是女主人。先在 dinner party 后小停，再把 asked me to sit next to 读成一个安排座位的动作。

sentences.text: Mrs. Rumbold was a large, unsmiling lady in a tight black dress.
sentences.focus_zh: unsmiling 是表情严肃、不微笑；tight black dress 是她的服装描写，读得客观尊重，不要夸张。

sentences.text: She did not even look up when I took my seat beside her.
sentences.focus_zh: not even look up 要读出她完全没有接话的信号；took my seat beside her 是在她旁边坐下。

sentences.text: Her eyes were fixed on her plate and in a short time, she was busy eating.
sentences.focus_zh: fixed on her plate 表示眼睛一直盯着盘子；in a short time 是 soon，后半句读出她专心吃饭。

sentences.text: I tried to make conversation. 'A new play is coming to "The Globe" soon,' I said. 'Will you be seeing it?'
sentences.focus_zh: make conversation 是礼貌找话题；The Globe 是剧场名；Will you be seeing it? 要用轻柔上扬的寒暄语气。

sentences.text: 'Will you be spending your holidays abroad this year?' I asked.
sentences.focus_zh: Will you be spending...? 是礼貌询问未来安排；abroad 是在国外，your holidays abroad 要连顺。

sentences.text: 'Will you be staying in England?' I asked.
sentences.focus_zh: 第三个问题仍然用 Will you be doing...?；staying in England 是留在英国，读出礼貌但已经有点尴尬的节奏。

sentences.text: In despair, I asked her whether she was enjoying her dinner. 'Young man,' she answered, 'if you ate more and talked less, we would both enjoy our dinner!'
sentences.focus_zh: In despair 是社交上没招了；whether she was enjoying 是间接问句；最后 eat more and talked less 要读出干脆、尖一点但不发火的收尾。
